reviews.review_description: Very very disappointed. What is this :(?  I can't go anywhere it's just a few short second small 2D clips and some kind of wobbly short larger vid, what zoo gave permission to use their anjmals this looks so bad. In the start there are white low def models and some animals that can be animated in the distance if I hit enough buttons.  There were little animals but they don't do anything and fall through the ground. I'll check back in the future if this is out of early access, maybe it will be way different .... this is not something that should be sold IMO, maybe free in early access ...

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback, and we're truly sorry that your experience was disappointing. We appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts, as it helps us improve the app.

We are actively working on adding more animals to the experience to make it more engaging.
We will continue updating the app with more high-quality 180-degree video content from zoos.
This app is not developed by any specific zoo—we aim to capture and present the best moments of these amazing animals through immersive video. As technology improves, we are committed to enhancing video quality for a better experience.
We understand the issue with animals falling through the ground, and we are working on fixing this to ensure they load correctly and interact as expected.
We appreciate your patience and hope you’ll check back in the future as we continue improving the app. Your feedback is invaluable, and we are committed to making this a better experience for everyone.

reviews.review_title: Wildlife adventure  in our room wow!
reviews.review_description:
This game has been a delightful experience for me and my family. The opportunity to explore the animal kingdom in VR is truly unique! My kids love it, and it's heartwarming to see them so excited about discovering animals like lions and giraffes right in our living room.

The animations are incredibly lifelike, and the 180-degree videos offer an amazing close-up view of these fascinating creatures. My kids are learning a lot while having fun, which is a huge bonus. I also love that the app is consistently updated with new animals and features, so there's always something fresh to explore.

It’s become a favorite in our household, and I enjoy seeing my kids engaged and enthusiastic about nature through such an interactive platform!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your support, we're glad to be of help to your kids! Please expect a updated version soon, with even more content and features, such as a closeup 2d video within a 3d 180 video!
